description: Elias and Thomas, co-founders of NeoDym, discuss security in Solana smart contracts, emphasizing the importance of thinking like an attacker to identify vulnerabilities. They introduce a workshop format combining presentations and hands-on challenges to enhance security understanding.
topic_summary: The session covers the mindset of an attacker, the significance of Capture the Flag (CTF) challenges, and strategies for identifying vulnerabilities in smart contracts. It highlights the need for collaboration and critical thinking in security assessments.
